person.name: Alix de Lorraine
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Alix Lorraine (of Lorraine)
Also Known As: "Alix"
Date of birth: 1145
Place of Birth: Metz, Lorraine, France
Death: August 25, 1192 (46-47)
Burgundy, France
immediate family:

Daughter of Mathieu I, Duke of Upper Lorraine and Judith Bertha von Schwaben
Wife of Hugh III, Duke of Burgundy
Mother of Eudes III, duc de Bourgogne; Alexandre I de Bourgogne, seigneur de Montagu; Alix de Bourgogne; Adele de Bourgogne and Andre VI Duke of Bourgogne
Sister of Matheus II Toulouse, Comte de Toul; Judith de Lorraine, Comtesse de Bourgogne; Ferry I, duc de Haute-Lorraine; Thierry, Bishop Elector of Metz Dietrich of Metz, Bischof; Sophia deLorraine; Duchess de Lorraine; N.N. of Lorraine; Philippe de Lorraine and Simon II, Duke of Lorraine « less
Jutta von Thüringen's half-sister; Ludwig III, Graf von Sachsen Herzög von Thüringen; Friedrich I von Thüringen-Ziegenhain, graf; Heinrich Raspe von Thuringen, III; Hermann I von Sachsen and Thüringen; Hedwige von Wettin and Sophia von Thüringen « less
Managed by: Private User
Last Update: April 13, 2018

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix de Lorraine於1145年1月15日出生在法國德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希時，她的父親Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine26歲，母親Bertha von Schwaben21歲。她於1165年與Hugues III de Bourgogne結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1182年8月25日在法國布格享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix de Lorraine于1145年1月15日出生在法国德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希时，她的父亲Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine26岁，母亲Bertha von Schwaben21岁。她于1165年与Hugues III de Bourgogne结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1182年8月25日在法国布格享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix de Lorraine was born on 15 January 1145, in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, her father, Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine, was 26 and her mother, Bertha von Schwaben, was 21. She married Hugues III de Bourgogne in 1165. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 25 August 1182, in Burgundy, France, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix de Lorraine est née le 15 janvier 1145, à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, son père, Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Bertha von Schwaben, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Hugues III de Bourgogne en 1165. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 août 1182, à Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix de Lorraine am 15. Januar 1145 in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine 26 und ihre Mutter Bertha von Schwaben 21. Sie hat 1165 Hugues III de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. August 1182 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Burgund, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Lorraine è nata il il 15 gennaio 1145 nel Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, sua padre, Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Bertha von Schwaben, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Hugues III de Bourgogne nel 1165. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 agosto 1182, nel Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alix de Lorraineが1145年1月15日にフランスグランド エストメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシで生まれた時，父Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraineは26歳，母Bertha von Schwabenは21歳であった。1165年にHugues III de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1182年8月25日にフランスボウルゴグンで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix de Lorraine(이)가 1145년 1월 15일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우르테-트-모셀 난시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertha von Schwaben(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1165년 Hugues III de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1182년 8월 25일 프랑스 부르고그니에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.15 Jan 1145–25 August 1182: 1145 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 15–1182 оны Наймдугаар сарын 25

pt.15 Jan 1145–25 August 1182: 15 de janeiro de 1145–25 de agosto de 1182
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Lorraine nasceu em 15 de janeiro de 1145, em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Bertha von Schwaben, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugues III de Bourgogne em 1165. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de agosto de 1182, em Bourgogne, França, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix de Lorraine родилась 15 января 1145 г. в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertha von Schwaben, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugues III de Bourgogne в 1165 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 25 августа 1182 г. в местности бургогн, Франция в возрасте 37 лет.

es.15 Jan 1145–25 August 1182: 15 de enero de 1145–25 de agosto de 1182
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix de Lorraine nació el 15 de enero de 1145, en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Bertha von Schwaben, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Hugues III de Bourgogne en 1165. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de agosto de 1182, en Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 37 años.
